name: Machine Learning Architecture
purpose: The purpose is to establish an ML architecture supporting training and deployment, consistent with the ML requirements, and to evaluate the ML architecture against defined criteria.

outcomes.text: Hyperparameter ranges and initial values are determined as a basis for the training.
Evaluation of ML architectural elements is conducted.
Interfaces of the ML architectural elements are defined.
Resource consumption objectives for the ML architectural elements are defined.
Consistency and bidirectional traceability are established between the ML architectural elements and the ML requirements.
The ML architecture is agreed and communicated to all affected parties.

basePractices.title: Develop ML architecture
basePractices.description: Develop and document the ML architecture that specifies ML architectural elements including details of the ML model, pre- and postprocessing, and hyperparameters which are required to create, train, test, and deploy the ML model. backpropagation. basePractices.title: Determine hyperparameter ranges and initial values
basePractices.description: Determine and document the hyperparameter ranges and the initial values as a basis for the training.

basePractices.title: Analyze ML architectural elements

basePractices.title: Define interfaces of the ML architectural elements
basePractices.description: Determine and document the internal and external interfaces of each ML architectural element including its interfaces to related software components.
